programme.title: Man's Greatest Food

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.desc: Andrew wants to find out what Hawaiians really like to eat; dried octopus bile sac; crispy pork intestine;and a traditional take on a raw fish salad that includes the eyeballs.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern makes some tasty new discoveries in Cleveland; pig head; kidney ramen; popcorn shoots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.sub-title: St. Croix, Usvi: Bull's Feet In Paradise
programme.desc: Andrew visits St. Croix in the U.S. Virgin Islands, where he discovers a diverse cultural melting pot of food. Goat water soup; conch roti; breadfruit tostones.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America
programme.desc: Zimmern explores the many layers of flavors from the past and present that can be found in this southwestern state.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America

programme.desc: Alfonso explores foods with farm-fresh ingredients; the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies; the North Carolina potatoes in the Trinity Frozen Foods Southern Sweet Potato Fries; Mott's Snack & Go Strawberry Applesauce Pouch.
